skill.name: azure-rbac
skill.description: Helps users choose least-privilege Azure RBAC roles, generate assignment commands, and prepare Bicep role assignment snippets.
skill.summary: Select least-privilege Azure RBAC roles and generate role assignment guidance.
skill.author: microsoft

security_audit.summary: The four static weak-cryptography alerts are false positives caused by ordinary words in SKILL.md, including frontmatter and role-selection instructions. No cryptographic code, executable scripts, data exfiltration, prompt injection, or unsafe system behavior was found in the reviewed file.

content.user_title: Assign Azure RBAC Roles with Least Privilege
content.value_statement: Azure role assignment can be difficult when teams need precise access without over-permissioning identities. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code select suitable Azure RBAC roles and produce assignment guidance.
actual_capabilities: Finds minimal Azure RBAC role definitions for requested permissions.
Generates Azure CLI guidance for assigning roles to identities.
Suggests custom role definitions when no built-in role fits.
Provides Bicep role assignment snippets using Azure schema guidance.
Keeps recommendations focused on Azure RBAC role selection.
limitations: Does not create or configure managed identities.
Does not provide broad Azure security hardening guidance.
Requires clear target scope, identity, and permission requirements.
Depends on available Azure documentation and generation tools.

use_cases.title: Grant Storage Access
use_cases.description: Choose a least-privilege role for an application that must read blob data.

use_cases.title: Prepare Infrastructure Templates
use_cases.description: Create Bicep guidance for repeatable Azure RBAC assignments in deployments.

use_cases.title: Review Access Requests
use_cases.description: Compare requested permissions against built-in and custom Azure roles.

prompt_templates.title: Find a Basic Role
prompt_templates.prompt: What Azure RBAC role should I assign so this identity can read blobs in one storage account?

prompt_templates.title: Generate Assignment Guidance
prompt_templates.prompt: Find the least-privilege role for this managed identity and provide Azure CLI assignment steps for the resource group scope.

prompt_templates.title: Compare Built-In Options
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare Azure built-in roles for reading Key Vault secrets and explain which role grants the minimum required access.

prompt_templates.title: Design a Custom Role
prompt_templates.prompt: No built-in role fits these exact permissions. Draft a custom Azure RBAC role plan and Bicep assignment guidance.

output_examples.input: An app needs read-only access to blobs in one storage account.
output_examples.output: The response identifies the narrowest suitable built-in role, explains the scope choice, and provides CLI and Bicep guidance.

output_examples.input: A deployment identity needs only specific management actions across a resource group.
output_examples.output: The response compares built-in roles, notes any permission gaps, and recommends a custom role only when needed.

output_examples.input: A reviewer wants to confirm whether Contributor is too broad for a request.
output_examples.output: The response explains why broad roles may exceed the need and suggests a more limited Azure RBAC alternative.

best_practices: Provide the exact Azure scope before asking for role assignment guidance.
List required data-plane and management-plane permissions separately.
Prefer built-in least-privilege roles before designing custom roles.
anti_patterns: Do not request broad Owner or Contributor access without defined requirements.
Do not use this skill to create managed identities.
Do not treat generated guidance as a substitute for tenant policy review.

faq.question: What does this skill help with?
faq.answer: It helps select Azure RBAC roles and generate role assignment guidance for identities.

faq.question: Can it create a managed identity?
faq.answer: No. Managed identity creation and configuration are outside this skill's scope.

faq.question: Can it recommend custom roles?
faq.answer: Yes. It can suggest a custom role when no built-in Azure RBAC role fits the requested permissions.

faq.question: Does it generate Bicep guidance?
faq.answer: Yes. It can provide Bicep role assignment guidance using Azure schema and best practice tools.

faq.question: What information should I provide?
faq.answer: Provide the identity, target scope, required permissions, and whether access is for data or management operations.

faq.question: Is it for general Azure security reviews?
faq.answer: No. It focuses on Azure RBAC role selection and role assignment guidance.
